text:
All Annual Managed Care Plan files 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 

VALUES: FIPS state codes can be found at: https://www.census.gov/library/reference/code-lists/ansi/ansi-
codes-for-states.html 

2-digit value (with leading zeros) 
01 = Alabama 
02 = Alaska 
04 = Arizona 
05 = Arkansas 
06 = California 
08 = Colorado 
09 = Connecticut 
10 = Delaware 
11 = District of Columbia 
12 = Florida 
13 = Georgia 
15 = Hawaii 
16 = Idaho 
17 = Illinois 
18 = Indiana 
19 = Iowa 
20 =
